properties.name: Capitol Complex Child Development Center
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Children receive lunch with milk and daily snacks prepared according to Child and Adult Care Food Program (CACFP) guidelines.
properties.Eligibility: Only for UT Austin faculty, staff, and students with families

properties.name: UT Child Development Center
properties.Eligibility: Only for UT Austin faculty, staff, and students with families
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Full food service program that provides daily breakfast, lunch, and snacks for enrolled children according to Child and Adult Care Food Program (CACFP) guidelines.

properties.name: UT Outpost Family Support Satellite - First Year Experience Office (JES 115A)
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
This parenting student resource pantry provides diapers, wipes, and formula. Located in the Jester Center (JES 115A).
properties.Eligibility: Must be a student at UT Austin with a UT ID

_umap_options.name: Food Support for Families
_umap_options.description: Balancing the roles of a college student or faculty member and being a parent can be challenging. These programs help ease that burden by providing free meals for their children.
